Done
Research residency types
Pensionado, Rentista, or Familiar
Now — Apr 15
Gather documents from home country
Criminal record, birth cert, marriage cert
Apr 15 — May 1
Apostille all documents
Allow 2-3 weeks for processing
May 1 — May 15
Translate documents in Uruguay
Must be done by public translator (traductor público)
May 15
Submit residency application
At DNM office in Montevideo or online
May 15 — Aug 15
Wait for resolution
Typical processing: 60-90 days
